name: legal-vendor-check
description: Vendor MSA/DPA/SLA stack status: Clear / Conditional / Block — not legal advice

steps.prompt:
Run skill legal-playbook procedure **vendor-check** against knowledge/legal/playbook.md.
Assess contract stack completeness, data roles, security, liability, exit, auto-renew.
Output status Clear | Conditional | Block, gaps table, RED/YELLOW list, counsel gate.
If documents are missing, list exactly what to collect. Not legal advice.

steps.action: Acknowledge vendor-check is not procurement approval
steps.detail: Human confirms counsel/security sign-off still required for Block or Conditional.
